project_name: Italian Sales Agent CRM (Gestionale per Agenti di Commercio)
rationale: Designed for field agents who are mobile and need high legibility outdoors (light theme). The Swiss/High-Contrast archetype provides objective clarity for dense data (commissions, KPIs, pipelines), while the Sartorial Navy and Warning Orange accents bring a tailored European business elegance, actively avoiding the generic SaaS purple-blue gradient.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Control Room Grid for data dense views on desktop.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_strategy: Mobile-first. Use a native-feeling bottom navigation bar fixed to the screen bottom. Hide complex tables on mobile; use full-width stackable cards instead.
spacing_and_layout.surface: The 'Grid Borders' look. Flat backgrounds with 1px solid borders (border-[#E4E4E1]). Minimal to zero soft shadows to maintain a brutalist/tactile hybrid. Use small corner radiuses (rounded-md / 6px).

components.buttons: Square or minimal radius (rounded-md). Solid high-contrast colors. No gradients. Hover state must increase contrast or shift to a slightly lighter hue.
components.cards: Flat, pure white background against the off-white #F9F9F8 canvas. 1px stark border. No shadow.
components.tables: Dense rows. Sticky headers. Use Shadcn Table component. For mobile screens, use a repetitive card layout instead of a horizontal scrolling table.
components.map: Leaflet map with a custom monochrome light tile layer to match the #F9F9F8 background. Geolocation pins should use the #FF5A00 (Warning Orange) brand color for high visibility.
components.kanban: For the prospect pipeline. Tight columns, distinct column backgrounds (subtle #F3F3F1) with crisp white cards.
components.navigation: Bottom tab bar for mobile containing the 4 core sections (Dashboard, Clients, Agenda/Map, Quotes). Desktop gets a collapsible left sidebar.
components.ai_assistant: Should not look like a magical consumer chatbot. It must be a sterile, analytical sidebar or slide-out sheet titled 'Analisi Previsionale & Suggerimenti', using the mono font for data points.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Crisp, professional, avoiding overly rounded 'cute' tech vectors.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist geometric texture, use minimally as a subtle overlay on auth page or header.
Italian architectural scene for the login page hero section. Add a light #F9F9F8 gradient overlay so the login form remains legible.
Profile picture of the logged-in sales agent.

instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_first_execution: CRUCIAL: Build all layouts from the mobile view first (`w-full` / `grid-cols-1`). Hide complex data tables on mobile using `hidden md:table` and display stackable info cards instead. Implement a fixed bottom navigation tab bar on mobile (`fixed bottom-0`).
instructions_to_main_agent.mandanti_multi_brand: Provide a quick 'Context Switcher' dropdown in the top header to change the active 'Mandante' (Brand). Change the primary accent color tag to remind the user of the active scope.
instructions_to_main_agent.map_integration: Ensure the Leaflet map container has a responsive defined height (e.g., `h-[50vh] md:h-full`). Add interactive geolocation markers using the Warning Orange accent for immediate attention.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs MUST have `data-testid` attributes with a role-based naming convention (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: Use raw Tailwind classes for layout structures (flex, grid). Limit the use of pre-made Shadcn layout cards if they enforce unwanted padding. Prefer direct div construction with the specified 1px border grid system for high-density pages.
